subcodes.first_line: This infinitesimal atom beareth witness, at the effulgence of Thy Ancient Beauty in this darksome night, before the radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهادت میدهد این ذره دکا عند تشعشع جمال ازلیت تو در این لیل صما تلقاء تلالو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
